Action: Business Issuer creates a deferred credential offer for an unbound SD-JWT credential
Data:
- Credential type: unbound_example_sd_jwt
- Deferred issuance (deferred = true)
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with credential offer and transaction_id

Action: Wallet collects transaction ID from deferred offer; Issuer marks credential as READY; Wallet fetches credential
Data:
- Transaction ID from offer
- Management ID
- Status update: READY
Expected Result: Wallet successfully retrieves the unbound SD-JWT credential using transaction ID

Action: Business Verifier creates verification request; Wallet submits SD-JWT presentation
Data:
- Verification request deeplink
- Unbound SD-JWT credential
- OID4VP flow
Expected Result: Wallet constructs and submits presentation; verification state is SUCCESS

Action: Issuer credential status is updated to ISSUED; Subsequent update attempts are rejected
Data:
- Management ID
- Attempt to update credential data after issuance
Expected Result: Issuer status changes to ISSUED; retry update fails with HTTP 400: 'Credential is either not deferred or has an incorrect status'
